CLI-2W.title: 59:2: Unexpected character `!` before name
CLI-2W.rationale: User-authored MDX/acorn parse error surfaced as InternalError; should be ParseError at parseImagePaths call sites.
CLI-2W.fixSummary: Wrap parseImagePaths in DocsDefinitionResolver and previewDocs with CliError(ParseError).
CLI-2W.problemSignature: Docs or preview path: MDX/acorn parse error (often bad `!` or JSX) while resolving doc image paths; showed as InternalError.

CLI-2V.title: MDX / docs image path parse failure
CLI-2V.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-2W; one PR covered both.
CLI-2V.problemSignature: Docs or preview path: MDX/acorn parse error (often bad `!` or JSX) while resolving doc image paths; showed as InternalError.

CLI-2X.title: Filesystem / errno false positive
CLI-2X.rationale: User/env errno (e.g. ENOENT) misclassified as InternalError.
CLI-2X.fixSummary: ErrnoException mapping in resolveErrorCode; USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS / NETWORK_ERRNOS.
CLI-2X.problemSignature: Filesystem or syscall errno from user environment (e.g. missing file, permission) surfaced as InternalError instead of environment-style CLI error.

CLI-1X.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-2X; one PR covered both.

CLI-1W.title: Filesystem / errno / EPIPE-style false positive
CLI-1W.rationale: User/env or pipe closure; EPIPE listener on TtyAwareLogger plus errno mapping.
CLI-1W.fixSummary: PR 15283: process.stdout/stderr error listener + errno mapping.
CLI-1W.problemSignature: EPIPE or broken pipe when user pipes CLI stdout/stderr to tools like head/jq; errno-style noise reaching error reporter.

CLI-2E.title: YAML parse in OpenAPI load
CLI-2E.rationale: YAMLException from user spec misclassified as InternalError.
CLI-2E.fixSummary: Wrap yaml.load in loadOpenAPI; CliError(ParseError) with file/line/column.
CLI-2E.problemSignature: Invalid YAML while loading a user OpenAPI spec (yaml.load path); parser exception treated as InternalError.

CLI-2A.title: YAML parse in OpenAPI load
CLI-2A.rationale: Docs/workspace YAML parse failure was still able to bubble as InternalError from the docs.yml boundary.
CLI-2A.fixSummary: Wrap docs.yml yaml.load in loadRawDocsConfiguration as CliError(ParseError).
CLI-2A.problemSignature: Invalid YAML while loading a user OpenAPI spec (yaml.load path); parser exception treated as InternalError.

CLI-24.title: YAML parse in OpenAPI load
CLI-24.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-2E; one PR covered both.
CLI-24.problemSignature: Invalid YAML while loading a user OpenAPI spec (yaml.load path); parser exception treated as InternalError.

CLI-1F.title: YAML parse in OpenAPI load
CLI-1F.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-2E; one PR covered both.

CLI-13.title: swagger2openapi conversion failure
CLI-13.rationale: User OpenAPI v2 spec conversion failure should be ParseError.
CLI-13.problemSignature: User OpenAPI v2 document fails swagger2openapi conversion to v3; conversion error treated as InternalError.

CLI-10.title: Container aggregate / sdk generate
CLI-10.rationale: ContainerError + aggregate InternalError double-report; use TaskAbortSignal.
CLI-10.fixSummary: ContainerError non-reportable; sdk generate uses TaskAbortSignal instead of aggregate CliError.
CLI-10.problemSignature: sdk generate or docs publish with Docker/container tasks: task failures double-reported as aggregate InternalError / ContainerError noise.

CLI-19.title: Container aggregate / docs publish
CLI-19.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-10; one PR covered both.
CLI-19.problemSignature: sdk generate or docs publish with Docker/container tasks: task failures double-reported as aggregate InternalError / ContainerError noise.

CLI-2G.title: Container / task failure reporting
CLI-2G.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-10; one PR covered both.
CLI-2G.problemSignature: sdk generate or docs publish with Docker/container tasks: task failures double-reported as aggregate InternalError / ContainerError noise.

CLI-26.title: Container / task failure reporting
CLI-26.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-10; one PR covered both.

CLI-11.title: Generator not found (generators.yml)
CLI-11.rationale: User references unknown generator image; should be ConfigError not InternalError.
CLI-11.problemSignature: generators.yml references a generator image or version that is not found in FDR/registry; surfaced as InternalError instead of config error.

CLI-1H.title: Organization create validation / network
CLI-1H.rationale: ValidationError/NetworkError passed explicitly instead of InternalError.
CLI-1H.problemSignature: Organization create flow: validation or network failures bubbled up as InternalError instead of explicit validation/network CLI errors.

CLI-J.title: Rerun CLI at version failure
CLI-J.rationale: Spurious InternalError on rerun failure; TaskAbortSignal.
CLI-J.problemSignature: CLI rerun-at-version path failed and reported misleading InternalError instead of controlled task abort.

CLI-2Z.title: Schema validation / minified class names
CLI-2Z.rationale: isSchemaValidationError could not match minified constructor names.
CLI-2Z.fixSummary: Set this.name on JsonError, ParseError, GeneratorError constructors.
CLI-2Z.problemSignature: Schema validation path: minified build broke constructor-name-based detection so parse/schema errors looked like InternalError.

CLI-E.title: Schema validation / minified class names
CLI-E.rationale: Same fix narrative as CLI-2Z; one PR covered both.
CLI-E.problemSignature: Schema validation path: minified build broke constructor-name-based detection so parse/schema errors looked like InternalError.

CLI-2H.title: Local + GitHub project config resolution
CLI-2H.rationale: User config / workspace path edge case misclassified as InternalError.
CLI-2H.fixSummary: Workspace / project config resolution and path handling (see PR #15283 changelog and follow-up #15484 if refined).
CLI-2H.problemSignature: Project load with local vs remote (e.g. GitHub) workspace or config paths: user path/config edge misclassified as InternalError.

CLI-3Q.title: ENOENT loading docs page
CLI-3Q.rationale: Same user/environment errno classification as CLI-2X; current code maps ENOENT to EnvironmentError.
CLI-3Q.problemSignature: Filesystem or syscall errno from user environment (e.g. missing file, permission) surfaced as InternalError instead of environment-style CLI error.

CLI-3A.title: EINTR interrupted syscall in uv_cwd
CLI-3A.rationale: EINTR is a clear errno-style environment signal, not a Fern product bug.
CLI-3A.fixSummary: Add EINTR to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS so resolveErrorCode maps it to EnvironmentError.
CLI-3A.problemSignature: Filesystem or syscall errno from user environment (EINTR interrupted syscall) surfaced as InternalError instead of environment-style CLI error.

CLI-H.title: ExitPromptError after SIGINT
CLI-H.rationale: Prompt SIGINT is a user abort; current CliContext prompt wrappers convert ExitPromptError to TaskAbortSignal before reporting.
CLI-H.fixSummary: Handle ExitPromptError at prompt boundaries and abort without Sentry reporting.
CLI-H.prOrIssue: Already handled in current code; ledger corrected in this PR
CLI-H.problemSignature: Interactive prompt cancellation via SIGINT surfaced as Sentry InternalError instead of a non-reportable user abort.

CLI-3P.title: Global theme fetch returned HTTP 403
CLI-3P.rationale: Global theme lookup failures are auth/config/network conditions, not internal CLI defects.
CLI-3P.fixSummary: Pass ConfigError/NetworkError codes from stitchGlobalTheme failAndThrow sites.
CLI-3P.problemSignature: Docs global-theme fetch or asset download failure reported through failAndThrow without a non-reportable config/network code.

CLI-31.title: Failed to parse version: 0.x
CLI-31.rationale: Invalid version strings should be reported with explicit VersionError codes at callers/boundaries, not central name-based classification.
CLI-31.fixSummary: Wrap dependency CLI version parsing with VersionError; existing generator-version callers already wrap invalid versions explicitly.
CLI-31.problemSignature: Invalid generator or CLI version string (e.g. 0.x, 1.x, *) reached Sentry as plain Error instead of VersionError.

CLI-2P.title: Failed to parse version: 1.x
CLI-2P.problemSignature: Invalid generator or CLI version string (e.g. 0.x, 1.x, *) reached Sentry as plain Error instead of VersionError.

CLI-3E.rationale: IR conversion invariant failure in getObjectPropertyFromResolvedType; this looks like a product bug rather than false-positive noise.
CLI-3E.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix
CLI-3E.problemSignature: IR conversion invariant failure while resolving response object properties; true product defect until converter behavior is fixed.

CLI-3F.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix
CLI-3F.problemSignature: IR generation failed to locate a referenced Fern type; possible reference/resolution product bug until validated.

CLI-3D.title: Mintlify import navigation is not iterable

CLI-3D.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix

CLI-3B.title: Null overlay in applyOverlays

CLI-3B.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix

CLI-1Q.title: formatDocs replace is not a function

CLI-1Q.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix

CLI-27.title: Invalid URL in app preview server

CLI-27.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix

CLI-Y.title: Generic empty Error in development
CLI-Y.rationale: Only visible event is development environment with empty Error value grouped at telemetry reporter; no product signature to fix or suppress safely.
CLI-Y.problemSignature: Development-only empty Error grouped at reportError/capture path with no actionable product signature.

CLI-1Y.title: Missing translations directory validation
CLI-1Y.rationale: Missing translations directory is user docs configuration and was reported without a non-reportable code.
CLI-1Y.fixSummary: Pass ValidationError when translation locale directories are missing.
CLI-1Y.problemSignature: Docs translations configuration references a locale whose translations directory is missing; should be validation/config semantics, not InternalError.

CLI-3C.title: Replay resolve failed no-lockfile
CLI-3C.rationale: Replay resolve no-lockfile is user/worktree state, not an internal CLI defect.
CLI-3C.fixSummary: Map fallback replay resolve failures to UserError in both CLI implementations.
CLI-3C.problemSignature: Replay resolve failed with no-lockfile or other user/worktree state and was explicitly reported as InternalError.

CLI-39.title: Failed to parse GitHub repository
CLI-39.rationale: Invalid GitHub repository strings in generators.yml are configuration errors and should be wrapped where generators.yml is converted.
CLI-39.fixSummary: Wrap parseRepository failures in convertGeneratorsConfiguration as CliError(ConfigError); parseRepository still throws a plain Error.
CLI-39.problemSignature: Invalid GitHub repository config string (missing owner/repo or empty path part) surfaced as InternalError instead of ConfigError.

CLI-1K.title: GitHub pull request base branch invalid
CLI-1K.rationale: Remote generation task failures are generator/container task failures, not CLI internal defects.
CLI-1K.fixSummary: RemoteTaskHandler maps failed remote tasks to non-reportable ContainerError in current code.
CLI-1K.prOrIssue: Already handled in current code; ledger corrected in this PR
CLI-1K.problemSignature: Remote generation task failed because downstream generator/GitHub output rejected user configuration; should be non-reportable task/container failure.

CLI-3J.title: Windows temp OpenAPI filepath is not relative
CLI-3J.rationale: Absolute/Windows path reached a relative-path invariant; needs path normalization or boundary validation fix.
CLI-3J.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix
CLI-3J.problemSignature: OpenAPI or workspace path conversion received an absolute path where a relative path was required; path boundary bug until fixed.

CLI-18.title: Absolute OpenAPI filepath is not relative
CLI-18.rationale: Absolute path reached a relative-path invariant; needs path normalization or boundary validation fix.
CLI-18.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix
CLI-18.problemSignature: OpenAPI or workspace path conversion received an absolute path where a relative path was required; path boundary bug until fixed.

CLI-34.title: Python package path not found
CLI-34.rationale: Library docs generation failed in the external library-docs service; the CLI should not report service job failures as internal defects.
CLI-34.fixSummary: Map failed library-docs generation statuses to NetworkError instead of InternalError.
CLI-34.problemSignature: Library docs generation failed in an external service job; should be non-reportable service/network semantics.

CLI-2J.title: Failed to load generator migrations
CLI-2J.rationale: Migration loading failed because the user's local migration cache/npm environment could not create its cache directory.
CLI-2J.fixSummary: Wrap migration package install/load failures as CliError(EnvironmentError) while preserving true CliErrors.
CLI-2J.problemSignature: Generator migrations failed to load due local npm/cache/environment error; should be environment semantics.

CLI-2D.title: git rm -rf command failed
CLI-2D.rationale: Generated-output cleanup failed because the user's git worktree/submodule state rejected git rm.
CLI-2D.fixSummary: Wrap local generated-output git command failures as CliError(UserError).
CLI-2D.problemSignature: Git subprocess failure during generated output cleanup reported as InternalError; should be user/worktree semantics.

CLI-22.title: Auth0 SSO connection returned HTTP 400
CLI-22.rationale: SSO connection resolution 400 is an auth/login boundary failure, not an internal CLI defect.
CLI-22.fixSummary: Map Auth0 SSO resolve HTTP 400 responses to CliError(AuthError).
CLI-22.problemSignature: Auth0 login/SSO request returned HTTP 400 and surfaced as AxiosError; should be auth semantics.

CLI-D.title: Invalid BAML provider bedrock
CLI-D.rationale: Unsupported BAML provider comes from user AI configuration in generators.yml.
CLI-D.fixSummary: Wrap BAML client setup failures at the local-generation AI config boundary as CliError(ConfigError).
CLI-D.problemSignature: AI configuration selected an unsupported BAML provider and surfaced as InternalError; should be config semantics.

CLI-21.title: User post-generation sed command failed
CLI-21.rationale: Placeholder replacement failed in generated files because the local sed command could not process user output bytes.
CLI-21.fixSummary: Wrap auto-version placeholder replacement subprocess failures as CliError(UserError).
CLI-21.problemSignature: Auto-version placeholder replacement subprocess failed on generated/user files; should be user semantics.

CLI-1M.title: buf generate command failed
CLI-1M.rationale: buf/protobuf generation is an external local tool boundary; command failures should be user-facing, not internal.
CLI-1M.fixSummary: Run buf commands with controlled exit-code handling and map failures to CliError(UserError).
CLI-1M.problemSignature: buf/protobuf subprocess failed during generation and was reported as InternalError; should be user/tool semantics.

CLI-K.title: Package fern-api could not be found
CLI-K.rationale: Package manager bootstrap failure needs environment/package-boundary handling; not enough evidence for a safe suppression.
CLI-K.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until product fix
CLI-K.problemSignature: CLI package lookup/bootstrap failed because package could not be found; environment/package boundary needs investigation.

CLI-C.title: stream-json parser expected comma
CLI-C.rationale: The stream-json parser failure occurs while reading user-provided IR for diff; current code wraps it as ParseError at that boundary.
CLI-C.fixSummary: diff command catches streamObjectFromFile failures and reports CliError(ParseError).
CLI-C.prOrIssue: Already handled in current code; ledger corrected in this PR
CLI-C.problemSignature: stream-json parser failed on malformed user-provided IR input; should be parse semantics at diff boundary.

CLI-4N.title: ENOTEMPTY rmdir generated output
CLI-4N.rationale: ENOTEMPTY is a user-environment errno (directory not empty during rmdir of generated output); added to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS.
CLI-4N.fixSummary: Add ENOTEMPTY to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS in resolveErrorCode.
CLI-4N.problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOTEMPTY during generated-output cleanup surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-4R.title: ENOTEMPTY rmdir generated Java SDK
CLI-4R.rationale: Same ENOTEMPTY errno classification as CLI-4N.
CLI-4R.problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOTEMPTY during generated-output cleanup surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-4S.title: ENOTEMPTY rmdir generated Java SDK
CLI-4S.rationale: Same ENOTEMPTY errno classification as CLI-4N.
CLI-4S.problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOTEMPTY during generated-output cleanup surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-3S.title: ENOMEM open user spec file
CLI-3S.rationale: ENOMEM is a user-environment errno (out of memory opening file); added to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS.
CLI-3S.fixSummary: Add ENOMEM to USER_ENVIRONMENT_ERRNOS in resolveErrorCode.
CLI-3S.problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOMEM while opening user spec file surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-43.title: TypeError: fetch failed (docs resolver)
CLI-43.rationale: Undici TypeError: fetch failed escapes as unhandled error; wrapped fetch calls at boundary with try/catch → NetworkError in uploadDynamicIRs, SourceUploader, and uploadDynamicIRForSdkGeneration.
CLI-43.fixSummary: Wrap bare fetch() calls in uploadDynamicIRs, SourceUploader.uploadSource, and uploadDynamicIRForSdkGeneration with try/catch that classifies network failures as NetworkError at the call site.
CLI-43.problemSignature: Undici TypeError fetch failed during docs resolution surfaced as InternalError instead of NetworkError.

CLI-4H.title: TypeError: fetch failed (source upload)
CLI-4H.rationale: Same boundary-level fetch wrapping as CLI-43; SourceUploader.uploadSource now catches TypeError and classifies as NetworkError.
CLI-4H.problemSignature: Undici TypeError fetch failed during source upload surfaced as InternalError instead of NetworkError.

CLI-3R.title: EPERM mkdir unhandled rejection
CLI-3R.rationale: EPERM from PosthogManager mkdir escapes normal error handling as unhandled rejection; reaches Sentry via onUnhandledRejectionIntegration. Needs boundary-level wrapping at the PosthogManager call site.
CLI-3R.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until boundary-level fix
CLI-3R.problemSignature: Unhandled rejection with EPERM errno from background telemetry bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.

CLI-4Z.title: ENOSPC file watcher unhandled rejection
CLI-4Z.rationale: ENOSPC from file watcher escapes normal error handling as unhandled rejection; reaches Sentry via onUnhandledRejectionIntegration. Needs boundary-level wrapping at the file watcher call site.
CLI-4Z.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until boundary-level fix
CLI-4Z.problemSignature: Unhandled rejection with ENOSPC errno from file watcher bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.

CLI-4M.title: EPIPE write uncaught exception
CLI-4M.rationale: EPIPE from stdout/stderr write escapes normal error handling as uncaught exception; reaches Sentry via onUncaughtExceptionIntegration. Needs boundary-level wrapping at the stream write call site.
CLI-4M.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until boundary-level fix
CLI-4M.problemSignature: Uncaught exception with EPIPE errno from stream write bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.

CLI-3Y.title: spawn xdg-open ENOENT uncaught exception
CLI-3Y.rationale: ENOENT from spawn xdg-open escapes normal error handling as uncaught exception; reaches Sentry via onUncaughtExceptionIntegration. Needs boundary-level wrapping at the spawn call site.
CLI-3Y.prOrIssue: Keep in Sentry until boundary-level fix
CLI-3Y.problemSignature: Uncaught exception with ENOENT errno from spawn xdg-open bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.

CLI-3W.title: ENOENT reading OpenAPI spec
CLI-3W.rationale: ENOENT is already mapped to EnvironmentError by the errno classification shipped in CLI-2X.
CLI-3W.problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOENT from user environment surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-3X.title: ENOENT reading OpenAPI spec
CLI-3X.rationale: ENOENT is already mapped to EnvironmentError by the errno classification shipped in CLI-2X.
CLI-3X.problemSignature: Filesystem errno ENOENT from user environment surfaced as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-40.title: Received 429 Too Many Requests
CLI-40.rationale: HTTP 429 rate-limit from remote generation service. retryWithRateLimit now throws CliError(NetworkError) on exhaustion, and generateOne passes error object through failWithoutThrowing so resolveErrorCode propagates the code.
CLI-40.fixSummary: Change retryWithRateLimit exhaustion code from InternalError to NetworkError; pass error object in generateOne catch to failWithoutThrowing.
CLI-40.problemSignature: TooManyRequestsError from retryWithRateLimit reaching Sentry because failWithoutThrowing(message) lost the error object and code.

CLI-41.title: Docs preview server failed to start: Server process exited with code 1
CLI-41.rationale: Next.js subprocess failing to start is an environment issue (port conflict, missing deps, etc.), not a Fern bug. Reclassified from InternalError to EnvironmentError.
CLI-41.fixSummary: Change failAndThrow code from InternalError to EnvironmentError in runAppPreviewServer.ts.
CLI-41.problemSignature: startNextJsServer failure classified as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.

CLI-4B.title: Failed to load generator migrations for fernapi/fern-typescript-sdk
CLI-4B.rationale: npm install failure (EACCES on rename) in migration cache. loadMigrationModule already wraps non-CliError exceptions as CliError(EnvironmentError) at the boundary.
CLI-4B.fixSummary: Already fixed: loadMigrationModule catch block wraps with EnvironmentError.
CLI-4B.problemSignature: npm cache rename EACCES inside ensureMigrationsInstalled, caught and wrapped as EnvironmentError by loadMigrationModule.

CLI-4F.title: Global theme "dark" not found for org "asi"
CLI-4F.rationale: User references a global theme that does not exist. stitchGlobalTheme already passes ConfigError to failAndThrow for 404 and NOT_FOUND responses.
CLI-4F.fixSummary: Already fixed: failAndThrow passes { code: ConfigError } for theme-not-found.
CLI-4F.problemSignature: Global theme 404/NOT_FOUND classified as ConfigError by stitchGlobalTheme.

CLI-4Q.title: Failed to fetch global theme "nvidia": HTTP 403
CLI-4Q.rationale: HTTP 403 from FDR when fetching a global theme the org lacks access to. stitchGlobalTheme already passes ConfigError to failAndThrow for non-ok HTTP responses.
CLI-4Q.fixSummary: Already fixed: failAndThrow passes { code: ConfigError } for non-ok HTTP status.
CLI-4Q.problemSignature: Global theme HTTP 403 classified as ConfigError by stitchGlobalTheme.
